'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=OkVnMvKeySi91UYn90DRfLJbkoGauU4ec3fuaiFGD8Y-1772872093-1.0.1.1-XomID4ttAkAYiPww2r4JiJqrG1eQT3DueElDkjsr5y0"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
